heading: Hand Stripping
blockquote: Hand stripping involves removing the dull, older hairs in your dog's coat by hand.
body:
If you have a wire-coated or silk-coated dog, you've probably already realised that not all groomers are able to accommodate the techniques required to keep them looking their best.

Because these breeds have coats that require periodic "hand stripping" in order to be groomed to breed standard.

With over 20 years' experience, we pride ourselves on offering this specialist service to our clients, and we work closely with you to ensure we create the finish that is absolutely perfect for your dog.
